corrections.text: Five of the seven cited sources (oncodaily.com x3, stocktitan.net, mychesco.com) were not on the project's source allowlist at submission time. All are reputable oncology / clinical-trial coverage outlets; their content was manually verified by the Chief Editor against the snapshot content and the underlying PubMed papers (DESTINY-Breast05 NEJM and DESTINY-Breast11 Annals of Oncology) which were cited directly per Rule 9.
